registry.name: S7G Agent Registry
registry.description: Complete S7G + Pair stack agent registry — 9 agents for distribution, governance, provenance, and A2A mesh

agents.description: Sidecar distribution — canister registration, P2P resolution, auto-update
Provenance audit — Hypercore query, chain verification, action logging
Committee P2P — peer discovery, blob transfer, health monitoring
A2A cross-vendor bridge — task delegation, agent discovery, card publishing
Mobile OTA distribution — iOS/Android stubs, bundle seeding (Phase B, CI/CD-based)
Knowledge graph query — codebase structure, vulnerabilities, ownership
Vulnerability triage — centrality metrics, owner ranking
Semantic codebase explorer — file explanations, guided tours
Slack dispatcher — alerts, graph query routing

skills.description: Complete S7G + Pair stack integration skill — all 5 phases
